required_inputs: request intent and requested provider-network action
provider-network specialty boundary and adjacent specialist map
authority map for credentialing, contracting, payer operations, privacy, compliance, clinical review, and directory publication exceptions
refusal_triggers: request asks for contract approval, credentialing committee signoff, unsupported directory exception, payer interpretation, or network adequacy legal conclusion
request asks for clinical appropriateness, medical necessity, diagnosis, treatment planning, or licensed clinical judgment
request asks to publish provider status without authoritative credentialing, contract, roster, directory, and tenant-policy evidence

required_inputs: authoritative public healthcare regulator, payer/provider operating, and recognized workflow sources
source freshness metadata
tenant policy, payer contract, state rule, and provider agreement hierarchy
refusal_triggers: required public or tenant source context is missing
source freshness has decayed for a rule that changes directory, network, credentialing, privacy, or access handling
public guidance, state rule, payer contract, provider agreement, or tenant policy materially conflicts

required_inputs: provider roster, delegated feed, credentialing status, contract metadata, directory record, publication log, CRM ticket, case-management task, provider relations note, and audit record
provider entity, NPI, TIN, service location, product/network, payer, plan, provider type, effective dates, and requested action
tenant source-of-truth and publication evidence requirements
refusal_triggers: critical provider, credentialing, contract, directory, publication, or audit evidence is absent, stale, or contradictory
source-system update, publication proof, owner acknowledgement, or rollback condition cannot be traced
provider status change cannot be tied to authoritative systems of record

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory across provider network management, credentialing, contract lifecycle, directory publishing, CRM, case management, claims, referral, eligibility, authorization, privacy, document, and audit systems
provider-network owner map and approval matrix
credentialing, contract, roster, directory, referral, authorization, eligibility, publication, and privacy prerequisites
refusal_triggers: authoritative provider network, credentialing, contract, directory, CRM, or audit systems are unavailable or stale
current owner or next owner cannot be established
required tenant facts are missing and would change lifecycle, publication, access, or privacy handling

required_inputs: missing fact signals
source conflict indicators
authority risk flags
access, PHI, compliance, and publication risk markers
refusal_triggers: missing records materially change provider network status or publication action
policy or source conflict remains unresolved
clinical, payer, privacy, credentialing, contract, access, or compliance ambiguity blocks safe action

required_inputs: scope verdict
provider-network handoff context
adjacent specialist map
required transfer artifacts
refusal_triggers: request belongs to credentialing, contracting, payer operations, provider relations, privacy, compliance, legal, revenue cycle, patient access, utilization management, referral management, or clinical review
handoff is attempted without the minimum provider-network evidence set
adjacent owner cannot be uniquely identified

required_inputs: accepted provider-network intake
state model for accepted, validated, blocked, owner-routed, approved-to-publish, published, suppressed, complete, hold, rollback, and rework
approval, source-system, publication, and audit evidence matrix
refusal_triggers: required state-transition evidence is missing
request asks to mark provider onboarding, termination, directory correction, or issue management complete without approval, publication, owner acknowledgement, or audit evidence
adjacent-lane authority is required before moving state

required_inputs: exception type
source-system evidence
owner and approval map
publication, access, privacy, and compliance impact
refusal_triggers: exception requires credentialing approval, contract approval, payer interpretation, privacy decision, legal interpretation, or compliance signoff
inputs are incomplete or conflict with approved source records
provider status change lacks required authorization

required_inputs: final provider network management state
credentialing and contract evidence
directory publication or suppression proof
owner acknowledgement
rollback, audit, and retention requirements
refusal_triggers: completion evidence is missing or conflicts across systems
owner acknowledgement or publication proof has not been captured
retention-ready source references cannot be established

required_inputs: requested action and affected provider or member-access workflow
clinical owner map and licensed review requirements
patient-safety and care-access impact
refusal_triggers: request requires diagnosis, treatment planning, clinical capability determination, medical necessity, or licensed clinical judgment
provider access issue includes urgent symptoms, safety risk, or clinical triage dependency
administrative provider data is being used to imply a clinical conclusion

required_inputs: PHI, member complaint, claim, referral, eligibility, authorization, and access-risk indicators
minimum-necessary and consent constraints
privacy, clinical, patient access, and payer escalation routes
required_outputs: patient or member safety escalation note
refusal_triggers: request would disclose PHI outside approved role-based access or minimum-necessary controls
member access issue may create patient harm and requires clinical, patient access, or compliance review
payer policy, eligibility, referral, authorization, or coverage interpretation changes the answer
